guidance_categories.label: Daily Observance
guidance_categories.description: Suggested reflective observance derived from approved Panchang and guidance rules.

guidance_categories.label: Food Discipline
guidance_categories.description: Satvik food-oriented guidance only after source review.

guidance_categories.label: Mantra Reference
guidance_categories.description: Mantra display requires exact script, deity/context, source/method note, and review approval.

guidance_categories.label: Reflection
guidance_categories.description: Non-deterministic reflective guidance based on approved rule context.

output_guardrails: Do not present generic AI-generated guidance as Sanatan guidance.
Do not publish muhurta or Panchang claims without calculation context.
Do not publish mantra text without review.
Do not make deterministic claims about fate, health, finance, or guaranteed outcomes.
Attach method/source reference to every premium guidance output.
